description: FRONTIER: a function whose load-bearing legacy behavior is marked by an explicit DO-NOT-SIMPLIFY comment. v0.1 strips comments and detects only sort-divergence, so it misses this.
inspired_by: "DO NOT REMOVE" / "LEGACY" comments guarding on-disk format compatibility

findings.rationale: parseVersion carries an explicit LEGACY / DO-NOT-SIMPLIFY marker tying its empty-segment handling to an on-disk archive format. A compatibility-marker detector should surface the marked region when an edit touches it; v0.1 strips comments before analysis and only looks for sort-divergence, so it cannot.
